project_identity.name: ApnaGhr Field Rider System
project_identity.mission: Operating System for Field Operations - Tactical, High-Performance, Vibrant.

primary.name: Electric Indigo
primary.usage: Primary Actions, Active States, Key Brand Elements

gradients.rule: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use flat, high-contrast colors. Gradients only allowed for subtle 'glow' effects on active states.

headings.usage: All Page Titles, Section Headers, KPI Numbers

dashboard_web.sidebar: Fixed width (64px collapsed / 240px expanded), Dark Slate bg.
dashboard_web.grid_pattern: Bento Grid: KPI Cards (Col-span-3), Main Chart (Col-span-8), Recent Activity (Col-span-4).

mobile_app.header: Minimal. Page Title Left. Action Right.
mobile_app.navigation: Floating Bottom Bar (Island style) with 4-5 icons.
mobile_app.cards: Full width cards with 'Clip-board' style left border for status indication.

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white font-medium shadow-sm hover:translate-y-[-1px] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900

cards.metric: Flex-col, Label (text-sm text-muted-foreground), Value (text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight)

inputs.default: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500/20 focus:border-indigo-500 h-10 px-3
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium mb-1.5 block text-slate-700

badges.success: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.warning: bg-orange-50 text-orange-700 border border-orange-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.neutral: bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 border border-slate-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

maps.styling: Custom tile layer if possible, or standard OSM. Markers must be custom SVG icons (Rider Bike, House, Office).
maps.controls: Floating action buttons (Zoom, Recenter) in bottom-right.

rider_hero.context: Login Screen, Hero Section, Rider Profile

office_meeting.context: Admin Dashboard About, Login Page Background (blurred)

placeholder_map.context: Empty State for Map, Dashboard Widget Background

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for main backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle patterns.
Do NOT center-align long text. Use left-align for readability.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for Headings. Use 'Barlow Condensed' or a strong Sans-Serif.
Use 2x more padding than you think is necessary.
All interactive elements must have a :hover and :active state.
Ensure high contrast (WCAG AA) for outdoor visibility on the Rider App.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup 'Barlow Condensed' font from Google Fonts.
2. Configure Tailwind colors to match the 'Performance Pro' palette.
3. Create a 'Layout' component for the Rider App that handles the bottom floating nav.
4. Use the provided image URLs for the Login and Dashboard mockups.
5. Implement 'OpenStreetMap' using 'react-leaflet' for the Map View.
6. Build the 'Rider Dashboard' using the 'Bento Grid' strategy (KPIs top, List bottom).
8. For the Leaderboard, use a 'Gamified' list design with badges and rank numbers.
